ops.title: Add a builtin block type (3-language)
ops.description: Steps to add a new built-in cc-present block type across Go, web (TS/React), and iOS (Swift), keeping schema, renderer, and docs in sync.

ops.text: web/src/schema.ts: add the block's type + fields (canonical source of truth for the block shape)
internal/doc/doc.go: add the Go struct + validateXxx, and register it as a spec entry in internal/packs/registry.go (or the relevant built-in registry)
web: add the block's renderer component in web/src/components/
ios/CcPresentKit Doc.swift: add the closed Block enum case + decode/encode support
ios/CcPresent/Blocks/XxxBlockView.swift: add the SwiftUI view + wire it into BlockView.blockContent's exhaustive switch (the compiler forces this)
internal/state/testdata/: add a shared fixture if the reduced state shape changes
docs/contract.md + plugin/skills/present/reference/blocks.md: document the new block type
